title: gv-llm-pricing v1
description: Schema for the gv-llm-pricing v1 pricing manifest. Describes per-model USD-per-1k-token pricing for LLM providers, consumed by router-core and related components.

schema_version.description: Schema version tag. Must be the literal string "v1".

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp indicating when the manifest was generated.

source_notes.description: Optional free-form notes about the sources used to produce this manifest.

models.description: Map from model identifier to pricing record.

cached_prompt_usd_per_1k_tokens.description: Optional USD cost per 1,000 cached prompt tokens, if the provider bills cached prompts separately.

context_window_tokens.description: Optional maximum context window size in tokens.

deprecated.description: Whether this model is marked deprecated.

deprecation_notes.description: Optional notes describing the deprecation status.
